1: For For praise is comely for the upright.
2: Sing unto him with the psaltery and and an instrument of ten strings.
3: Play skilfully with a loud noise.
4: And all his works are done are done in truth.
5: The earth is full of the goodness of the LORD LORD .
6: And all the host of them by the breath of his mouth.
7: He layeth up the depth in storehouses.
8: Let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of him.
9: He commanded, and it stood fast.
10: He maketh the devices of the people of none effect.
11: The thoughts of his heart to all generations.
12: And And the people whom whom he hath chosen for his own inheritance.
13: The LORD LORD looketh from heaven; he beholdeth all the sons of men.
14: From the place of his habitation he looketh upon all the inhabitants of the earth.
16: A mighty man is not delivered by much strength.
17: Neither shall he deliver any any by his great strength.
18: Upon them that hope in his mercy;
19: And to keep them alive in famine.
20: He is is our help and our shield.
21: Because we have trusted in his holy name.
22: According as we hope in thee.
